reviews.review_msg: I would say that Ryan has been my best prof so far at SFU. I thought this class would be one of my driest classes out of all my other classes, turned out to be the one I looked the most forward to. He made environmental health science INTERESTING. Wish he taught more classes!

Dr. Allen is one of the top professors in the HSCI faculty! He is hilarious and makes the lecture very interesting so it's impossible to fall asleep in his class (even though it's at 8:30am). He is always there during office hours and makes time for you if you can't make them! Amazing professor, I would definitely take any of his classes again

He is always there during office hours and makes time for you if you can't make them! Amazing professor, I would definitely take any of his classes again

While Shelia Delany may be an incredibly intelligent lady and briallant writer that does not make her a good instructor. She treats her students like morons, and humiliates them, forcing students to read their poorly written papers in front of the class.

I was really excited for this class, until i got the "student manual" which is what he calls the class syllabus. In it is the only real reference for the term assignment which is the focus of the entire class. The example essays he gave out went on for paragraphs like literary poems that made connections that i couldn't personally see.
